title: Bhaktajaneswarar temple
tagline: Bhaktajaneswarar temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Bhaktajaneswarar Temple (also called Thirunavalur Temple or Bhathajaneeswaram) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thirunavalur, a village in Viluppuram dist
overview.description: Bhaktajaneswarar Temple (also called Thirunavalur Temple or Bhathajaneeswaram) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thirunavalur, a village in Viluppuram district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Bhaktajaneswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Manonmani Amman. The temple is located on the Panruti - Kedilam road.

topPlaces.name: T.Agaram
topPlaces.description: Thiru malai Agaram is an area in north Chennai in India. T.Agaram is located 1 km from Pennadam towards North Direction rich in production of Sugarcane, Paddy and Dairy.

topPlaces.name: Kallamedu Formation
topPlaces.description: The Kallamedu Formation is a Late Cretaceous (Maastrichtian) geologic formation located in the Ariyalur district of Tamil Nadu, India that forms part of the Ariyalur Group. It dates to the Maastrichtian of the Late Cretaceous.

topPlaces.name: Arasur
topPlaces.description: Arasur is a revenue village in the Thiruvennainallur taluk of Viluppuram district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, and the headquarters of Arasur revenue block.

items.note: Thiru malai Agaram is an area in north Chennai in India. T.Agaram is located 1 km from Pennadam towards North Direction rich in production of Sugarcane, Paddy and Dairy.

The Kallamedu Formation is a Late Cretaceous (Maastrichtian) geologic formation located in the Ariyalur district of Tamil Nadu, India that forms part of the Ariyalur Group. It dates to the Maastrichtian of the Late Cretaceous.
Arasur is a revenue village in the Thiruvennainallur taluk of Viluppuram district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, and the headquarters of Arasur revenue block.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhaktajaneswarar temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhaktajaneswarar temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhaktajaneswarar temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (134 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (132 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhaktajaneswarar temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhaktajaneswarar temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhaktajaneswarar temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bhaktajaneswarar temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhaktajaneswarar temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are T.Agaram, Kallamedu Formation, Arasur.
